protocol: study-swarm Step 4 (EXTERNAL_VERIFIER) — Stage 2 groundedness lens; Stage 1 existence oracle is the separate finetune-arc-prose-measurement.citation-receipt.json (36/36)
method: PoLL jury of the biggest Ollama Cloud THINKING flagships (600B+), family-disjoint from the Anthropic synthesizer, judging each finding against the cited paper's VERBATIM arXiv abstract supplied in-prompt (so recency past a juror's training cutoff cannot cause a false 'fabricated'). Tool: ollama-intern ollama_verify_claims.
panel_provenance: every batch reported 3/3 cloud-served with matching served_model (no local fallback, none excluded)
aggregation: lone-dissent-never-decides: CONFIRMED needs >=2 confirms, REFUTED needs >=2 refutes (min_refute_votes=2), else NEEDS_REVIEW
roster_check: ollama.com/search?c=cloud webfetched 2026-07-13 — deepseek-v4-pro / glm-5.2 / minimax-m3 / kimi-k2.7-code / nemotron-3-ultra confirmed current biggest thinking flagships
honest_ceiling: A CONFIRMED on frontier-model-authored claims is corroborating evidence, not proof — the panel reliably flags gross/over-attribution errors (it caught L1-05) and is weaker on a strong generator's subtle ones. Judged against the abstract only; a few findings' specifics live in the paper body (noted below) and were not abstract-verifiable.

the_one_catch.paper: Kadavath et al. 2022 (arXiv:2207.05221), Language Models (Mostly) Know What They Know
the_one_catch.as_written: P(True) AND P(IK) are reasonably-calibrated quantities that improve with scale
the_one_catch.jury: deepseek-v4-pro REFUTED, minimax-m3 UNCERTAIN, glm-5.2 CONFIRMED -> NEEDS_REVIEW
the_one_catch.why: the abstract says models 'struggle with calibration of P(IK) on new tasks' — the finding over-generalized P(IK) calibration
the_one_catch.resolution: memo finding narrowed: P(True) is well-calibrated and scales (load-bearing, unaffected); P(IK) is predictable but its calibration does not fully generalize to new tasks. The abstention verdict rests on P(True)/free-form, so the correction does not change any recommendation.

abstract_only_caveats_still_confirmed.L1-08: deepseek UNCERTAIN — the sampling+meaning-clustering mechanism is described in the body, not the abstract; core claims (unsupervised, single off-the-shelf model, predicts correctness) confirmed
abstract_only_caveats_still_confirmed.L3-20: glm UNCERTAIN — the explicit in-distribution-high / OOD-low framing is a body result; the shortcut-learning ('linearized subgraph matching') + complexity-decay claims confirmed
abstract_only_caveats_still_confirmed.L3-28: deepseek UNCERTAIN — GSM8K is not named in the abstract (MATH is); the '10 datasets, 13-19% absolute, ToRA-7B' claims confirmed

operational_lesson: batch size <=3 claims/call for these thinking flagships — at 9 claims/call two jurors' verbose output overflowed the parser and were excluded (weak 1/3); at 2-3 claims all 3 parse cleanly. Independent verify calls run fine in parallel (3 at a time, ~10-25s each).
